description: Returns a list of available Quickstart transformation package metadata details.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Specify the service identifier to filter Quickstart packages by connection service

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Specify the package name to filter Quickstart packages by name

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to fetch per page. Accepts a number in the range 1..1000; the default value is 100.
